title: Australia Unveils Cyber Security Push for Indo-Pacific Region

content.value: US President Donald Trump speaks to members of the media on the South Lawn of the White House before boarding Marine One in Washington, DC, US, on Friday, Oct. 24, 2025. Trump will look to sign economic agreements and critical minerals deals with trading partners during his trip to Asia, according to senior US officials, as the administration moves to ramp up pressure on China ahead of a crucial meeting with Xi Jinping.

Data center developers in Northern Virginia are asking utility Dominion Energy Inc. for as much power as several nuclear reactors can generate, in the latest sign of how artificial intelligence is helping drive up electricity demand.

title: Intel Earnings Signal Possible Comeback | Bloomberg Tech 10/24/2025

title_detail.value: Intel Earnings Signal Possible Comeback | Bloomberg Tech 10/24/2025

summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Intel’s earnings, as the chipmaker returned to profitability and gave an upbeat revenue forecast. Plus, banks are preparing to launch a $38 billion debt offering to help fund data centers tied to Oracle. That comes as the Bank of England begins to probe data center lending amid fears of an AI bubble. And, Mistral CEO Arthur Mensch discusses the company's release of a new platform to help enterprise clients make customizable AI tools. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary_detail.value: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Intel’s earnings, as the chipmaker returned to profitability and gave an upbeat revenue forecast. Plus, banks are preparing to launch a $38 billion debt offering to help fund data centers tied to Oracle. That comes as the Bank of England begins to probe data center lending amid fears of an AI bubble. And, Mistral CEO Arthur Mensch discusses the company's release of a new platform to help enterprise clients make customizable AI tools. (Source: Bloomberg)

content.value: Banner flags with the Nexperia Holding BV logo outside their headquarters in the 52Nijmegen high-rise building on the Noviotech Campus in Nijmegen, Netherlands, on Friday, Oct. 24, 2025. Nexperia notified its Japanese automotive customers that it may no longer be able to guarantee supply, triggering renewed concern about upheaval at the Dutch chipmaker snarling global supply chains.

title: Measles Outbreaks Across the US Spread As Vaccination Rates Fall

title_detail.value: Measles Outbreaks Across the US Spread As Vaccination Rates Fall

summary: Measles outbreaks have spread across the US to reach 41 states. The largest ongoing cluster in Utah and Arizona has now grown into the second-biggest outbreak of the year.

content.value: SALT LAKE CITY, UT - APRIL 26: In this photo illustration sterile water is prepared for a one dose bottle of measles, mumps and rubella virus vaccine, made by MERCK, at the Salt Lake County Health Department on April 26, 2019 in Salt Lake City, Utah. (Photo Illustration by George Frey/Getty Images)

title: Power Stocks Stumble as Investors See Cracks in AI-Fueled Rally

title_detail.value: Power Stocks Stumble as Investors See Cracks in AI-Fueled Rally

summary: For most of the year, it looked like power demand from AI was insatiable, sending investors rushing into shares of the companies that generate electricity. Whether coal-fired, wind-driven or nuclear, generators across the board saw dizzying rallies.

summary_detail.value: For most of the year, it looked like power demand from AI was insatiable, sending investors rushing into shares of the companies that generate electricity. Whether coal-fired, wind-driven or nuclear, generators across the board saw dizzying rallies.

author: Matthew Griffin

content.value: The sun sets behind utility lines during high temperatures in Columbia, South Carolina, US, on Monday, July 28, 2025. Nearly half the US will wilt under hot, sticky conditions through the bulk of the week as temperatures and humidity soar from Chicago to New York City and New Orleans, boosting power demand and raising health risks.

title: Canal+ Said to Explore Buying Out Comcast’s Stake in African Streaming Platform

title_detail.value: Canal+ Said to Explore Buying Out Comcast’s Stake in African Streaming Platform

summary: Canal+ SA is studying the possibility of buying out the remaining stake in African streaming platform Showmax from Comcast Corp., people familiar with the matter said, as the French media firm looks to consolidate its operations in the continent.

summary_detail.value: Canal+ SA is studying the possibility of buying out the remaining stake in African streaming platform Showmax from Comcast Corp., people familiar with the matter said, as the French media firm looks to consolidate its operations in the continent.

author: Vinicy Chan, Loni Prinsloo

content.value: A billboard advertises of streaming service Showmax, operated by MultiChoice Group Ltd., in Johannesburg, South Africa, on Wednesday, Dec. 18, 2024. MultiChoice Group is preparing to take on US streaming giants as the African TV company works to get its approximately $3 billion deal with Vivendi SE’s Canal+ over the line with regulators.

content.value: Anutin Charnvirakul, leader of the Bhumjaithai Party, arrives at parliament in Bangkok, Thailand, on Friday, Sept. 5, 2025. Anutin is poised to win a Thai parliament vote for prime minister on Friday after the conservative party politician cobbled together an unlikely alliance of royalist and pro-democracy groups to break a political deadlock.
